data.title: Spring Bird appoints Charlie Conn as Customer Support Manager to enhance customer success in rapidly growing transit operations.
data.description: An experienced professional has recently joined the leadership team at Spring Bird in Austin, Texas to enhance customer success within the rapidly expanding transit operations sector. The company, a key player in offering comprehensive transit bus services throughout North America, revealed the addition on September 19, 2025. This move aims to bolster the company's efforts to cater to the increasing demand for transit services as it continues to expand its operations.

data.title: Tourist activities in Machu Picchu resume with flexible ticket rescheduling. PROMPERÚ coordinates visitor access.
data.description: In response to COVID-19 challenges, adjustments have been made to enable tourists to reschedule entry tickets to the renowned Inca ruins. From Lima, Peru, on September 19, 2025, the Commission for the Promotion of Peru for Export and Tourism (PROMPERÚ) is alerting global travelers about the tourist train services...

data.title: Pivot Bio CEO to talk ag innovation at Climate Week NYC, Sept 22-24, 2025 along with global leaders.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Pivot Bio, a leading agtech company, is set to have a prominent role at Climate Week in New York City from September 22 to 24. CEO Chris Abbott will be participating alongside other influential figures in business and sustainability to showcase the significance of agriculture in addressing climate challenges.

data.title: Peru Pavilion at Expo Osaka-Kansai hits 1 million visitors, proving successful strategy; event continues until Oct 13.
data.description: The success of PROMPERÚ's strategy at Expo Osaka-Kansai 2025 has been validated with a remarkable achievement as the Peru Pavilion greeted its 1 millionth visitor on September 19, 2025. This pivotal moment underscores the effectiveness of their approach at the global exhibition, which is scheduled to run until October 13, 2025 in OSAKA, Japan.

data.title: Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. completes stock repurchase program, buying 120,996 shares at $15.01 each.
data.description: In Ottawa, Illinois on September 19, 2025, Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: OTTW), the parent company of OSB Community Bank, shared that it has successfully finished its planned stock repurchase initiative. Throughout this program, the company bought back 120,996 shares of its common stock at an average cost of $15.01 per share.

data.title: Reinvent Executives to share Metaswitch expertise and cloud CX insights at Alianza Navigate 25. CEO and VP to discuss growth strategies.
data.description: Justin Catlett, the CEO, along with Ray Napoletano, the VP of Sales, will discuss insights gathered from numerous Metaswitch deployments and delve into approaches for expansion with the cloud-native CX at an event in Scottsdale, Arizona. This event is scheduled for September 19, 2025. Reinvent Telecom, a wholesale unified communications provider, will be the host.

data.title: SBS CyberSecurity sees a 506% increase in TRAC module adoption among financial institutions, highlighting shift to modern GRC solutions.
data.description: In Madison, South Dakota on September 19, 2025, SBS CyberSecurity achieved a significant advancement in risk management modernization amid escalating cyber threats and regulatory requirements affecting financial institutions. Through an intensive 11-week summer initiative, SBS observed a remarkable 506% surge in the TRAC module, showcasing their commitment to enhancing cybersecurity measures.

data.title: EVE Energy in Wuhan, China completes world's first 400MWh energy storage project with 628Ah ultra-large cells.
data.description: In Wuhan, China on September 19, 2025, EVE Energy, a leader in big-batteries technology, achieved a significant milestone in the industry. Following their successful launch and mass production of big cells, EVE Energy completed the world's first 400MWh energy storage project. This groundbreaking project utilized 628Ah ultra-large cells, showcasing the company's innovation and progress in the field of energy storage.

data.title: Five Point's cash tender offer for outstanding 10.500% Initial Rate Senior Notes Due 2028 has expired.
data.description: Five Point Holdings, LLC revealed the launch of a cash tender offer on September 15, 2025, to acquire all outstanding 10.500% Initial Rate Senior Notes due 2028. The offer was for the Notes co-issued by Five Point Operating Company, LP and Five Point Capital Corp. The deadline for the tender offer was 5:00 p.m. New York City Time. Five Point operates under the NYSE symbol FPH and is based in Irvine, California.

data.title: FDA approves FORZINITY for Barth Syndrome. Stealth BioTherapeutics first therapy for rare disease. Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Needham, Massachusetts, Stealth BioTherapeutics Inc., a biotechnology company known as "Stealth," announced its focus on discovering, developing, and commercializing innovative treatments for diseases related to mitochondrial dysfunction. The company is currently at the commercial stage and aims to address critical medical needs in this area.

data.title: Teamsters demand fair contract from Kroger subsidiary Ralphs by Sept. 21 deadline after 2 months of negotiations.
data.description: A subsidiary of Kroger, Ralphs, has until the September 21 deadline to present a robust agreement following over two months of negotiations with Teamsters in Los Angeles. The current contract is set to expire soon, prompting the demand for a strong new deal.

data.title: Neue Alchemy launches AU79 Records, debut release Vanta Noir in under 24 hours in Chicago, Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Vanta Noir has just released their first album on both YouTube and various streaming platforms. Up next is Lyon Drive, with founder Isaiah Steinfeld making a return to the spotlight as the lead vocalist. Additionally, ALCHMY Coffee is gearing up for a re-launch as part of a simultaneous product push. This all comes as part of a rapid-paced journey that began at Fast Company's Innovation Festival and is making waves across the nation.

data.title: Faraday Future invests $41 million in Qualigen Therapeutics for crypto business through PIPE transaction.
data.description: In a press release today, it was revealed that Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) and Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) have partnered up for a significant deal. The California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company and QLGN have officially signed a securities purchase agreement for a private investment in public equity (PIPE) within QLGN. This agreement includes an investment in QLGN’s common stock and preferred stock. Alongside this, the two companies will be launching a new venture in the realms of cryptocurrency and web3 technologies. The partnership, announced on September 19, 2025, will see an influx of capital and resources into QLGN as they diversify their business activities.
